description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-image

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Border-radius, aspect-ratio, placeholder background. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Alt text requirement. Decorative image support (alt=""). Lazy loading. Aspect ratio for CLS prevention.
3. **Functionality** — Lazy loading (IntersectionObserver). Placeholder/skeleton on load. Error fallback. Aspect ratio enforcement. Object-fit. Responsive (srcset/sizes).
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Object-fit. Aspect ratio. Border radius.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Loading states. Error fallback. Lazy. Alt text.
8. **Storybook** — Various ratios. Lazy loading. Error state. Responsive.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Image field output. Responsive images module. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-image
